mapper.select: SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id

SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE m.member_no = #{memberId}

SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, cr.class_id, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id WHERE record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, cr.class_id, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.class_id = #{classId} AND m.member_no = #{memberId}
SELECT count(*) FROM class_record WHERE class_id = #{classId}

SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE cr.class_id = #{classId}

where.if: AND ( m.member_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT cr.record_id, m.member_no AS member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id
ORDER BY cr.join_time DESC, cr.record_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_record cr
JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id
